== Notes for [[Item:Q100765|Q100765]] ==

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Solomon_ben_Abraham_of_Montpellier '''Solomon ben Abraham ben Samuel'''], also known as Solomon of Montpellier, was a Provençal rabbi and Talmudist of the first half of the 13th century. He was rabbi at Montpellier, and leader of the movement against Maimonides.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8332AC1EFBBFA9822EF79916C3FDF
geni:6000000022514320785

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
